Subject: Girls' Weekend
Message:
Quick! Grab your calendars and mark the date!  Another Girls' Weekend is 
planned for November 30 - December 2.  It will be held at Lisa's beach house 
on Bolivar.
More information (and food assignments) will follow.  Hope to see you there.
Janell
